title: nlinarith fails on raw Euclidean angle atoms
informal_statement: A goal over `EuclideanGeometry.angle` atoms attacked by `nlinarith` before bridging the angles into scalar equations.

failure.input_context_summary: Goal involved angle identities over EuclideanGeometry.angle terms.
failure.attempt_summary: Applied nlinarith directly before converting angles to scalar equations; it burned the heartbeat budget as a deterministic timeout.
failure.lesson: Bridge geometry facts into scalar angle equalities before invoking arithmetic automation; treat nlinarith over angle atoms as expensive.

notes: Illustrative v0.1 negative example. Labeled non-proof-bearing training data (rung 0).
